text: FBI 302: witness describes Maxwell/Epstein recruitment route — London flat, two Paris encounters, Little St. James
Mar-a-Lago: victim recounts being given a tour by Trump with Epstein and Maxwell present
Maxwell's London townhouse (44 Kinnerton St): multiple victims describe assaults disguised as massages
Alan Dershowitz confirmed at Epstein's Palm Beach residence during OJ Simpson trial discussions (~1995)
Gov. Bill Richardson meets Epstein at 9 E 71st St, NYC — March 27 (email corroboration)
